framework_version: Dual-Mode SRM v1.0 — Acute Event Window

acute_mode.note: D=0.280 reflects single dominant narrative during coup window

key_events.event: Military coup — Chavez ousted, Carmona installed
Carmona dissolves National Assembly — international shock
Return to Miraflores Palace — global peak coverage
General strike — PDVSA oil stoppage begins

dual_mode_finding: HIGH RESONANCE is structurally impossible in SUSTAINED analysis (D cannot fall below 0.09 over months). It is achievable in ACUTE EVENT WINDOW analysis (D=0.28 during 10-day coup window) where a single narrative dominates. Chavez ACUTE SRM(lambda=2)=0.4199 = HIGH RESONANCE.
typology: Revolutionary Reversal Symbol — first Acute Event Window validation
